nasb.text: Will He be angry forever? Will He be indignant to the end?’ Behold, you have spoken And have done evil things, And you have had your way.”

esv.text: will he be angry forever, will he be indignant to the end?’ Behold, you have spoken, but you have done all the evil that you could.”

cnv.text: 耶和華怎會永遠懷怒， 常存憤恨呢？’ 你雖然這樣說了， 還是盡力去作惡。”

ccb.text: 难道你会永远发怒、 怀恨到底吗？’ 你虽然这样说， 却仍大肆作恶。”
